webApp.description: Tapayoka Vendor is a management dashboard for self-service businesses. Configure devices, accept QR payments, and monitor operations across multiple locations.
features: Device management for washers, dryers, parking, lockers, and vending machines

home.name: How to Get Started with Tapayoka Vendor
home.description: Set up your self-service business on Tapayoka in a few simple steps.

steps.name: Create Your Account
steps.text: Sign up with your email or Google account. You will be prompted to accept the terms of service and create your first workspace.

steps.name: Add a Location
steps.text: Go to Locations in your dashboard and add your first business location with its address details.

steps.name: Define Device Models
steps.text: Create device models such as Standard Washer or Parking Meter. Configure pricing strategy, slot mode, and action type for each model.

steps.name: Add Offerings
steps.text: Assign device instances to locations. Configure individual pricing and generate QR codes for each offering.

steps.name: Start Accepting Payments
steps.text: Print QR codes and place them on your devices. Customers scan to pay and start their session instantly.
